response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements. His background includes AI-agent infrastructure work, scalable microservices, and enterprise tooling, demonstrating depth in both technical and architectural challenges. While his resume highlights diverse languages and projects, his recent roles at Optilyz and re:cinq align well with the job's responsibilities, though some secondary responsibilities like Nest.js and Vitest are less explicitly detailed.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development with strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise
Proven experience in scalable architectures, microservices, and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest in recent roles, though React and Node.js are well-covered
Diverse but scattered experience across many languages/tools may dilute focus on core stack
No clear examples of direct collaboration with product/design teams in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Depth vs. breadth of stack alignment
